description: TypeScript/Node.js SDK for EuroMail — GDPR-compliant transactional email API (EU data residency, Finland). Send emails, manage domains, templates, webhooks, contact lists, and AI agent mailboxes.
rules: Initialize: const client = new EuroMail({ apiKey: process.env.EUROMAIL_API_KEY })
sendEmail() returns { id, status } where status is 'queued' (202 Accepted, not 201)
Use template_alias (string) not template_id when sending with a template
The 'from' field must use the apex domain (e.g. noreply@example.com), not the sending subdomain (noreply@em.example.com fails)
Webhook signature header: X-Euromail-Signature: t={timestamp},v1={hex} — verify with HMAC-SHA256
Agent mailbox: long-poll getNextMailboxMessage() → process → ackMailboxMessage() with lease_token
Batch: sendBatch() supports up to 500 emails per request
